texto: Hello, IT... Have you tried turning it off and on again?... OK, well, the button on the side. Is it glowing?... Yeah, you need to turn it on.... Err, the button turns it on.... Yeah, you do know how a button works, don't you?... No, not on clothes... I'm sorry, are you from the past?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Graham Linehan que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Hello, IT... Have you tried turning it off and on again?... OK, well, the button on the side. Is …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre trabalho, graham-linehan, humour, com foco em trabalho e humour.
